examples: Study on Acid Modified Niobic Acid Catalyst for Synthesis of 2, 5 - Dimethyl - 2, 4 - Hexadiene.
In this system, the water-washed niobic acid, acid-washed niobic acid and niobic acid for phosphoric acid-treated were studied.
Using niobic acid as catalyst, cyclohexane as dehydrant, benzyl propionate was synthesized based on propionic acid and benzyl alcohol.
